ItacPersonItem.Notes: See his biography by Oscar Mischiati, in DBI, which does not take into consideration the Accademia degli Eccitati in Bergamo. This is the only explanation I can find for Cazzati`s definition as `accademico eccitato`, which appears on his publications.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
